relationship.description: A user (registered or anonymous) authors many comments
Each comment is associated with one application
Each comment is stored in a specific format (HTML, Markdown)
Self‑referencing relationship for threaded replies (a comment may have many child replies)

metadata.improvements_made: Merged ANONYMOUS_USER into a single USER entity with an is_anonymous flag and optional contact_url/session_token fields, reducing redundancy. Added parent_comment_id attribute to COMMENT to model reply threads explicitly. Kept FORMAT as a separate entity with a unique name constraint for extensibility. Retained timestamps with timezone awareness and optional edit tracking attributes. Simplified the schema while preserving all required functionality.
